items.title:
[正面] Morimens!
The Only Gacha game that I still play no...
items.summary:
Morimens!
The Only Gacha game that I still play nowadays - And in my opinion one of the best. (Other Gacha games played: HSR, PGR, GI, ZZZ, Uma and some other minor ♥♥♥♥♥♥ ones)

Disclaimer:
I have spent around £30 on this game, so I am neither a whale nor a f2p.

Gameplay: 
Very similar gameplay to sts, can get slightly repetitive but the difficulty in the endgame content can alleviate that somewhat. Teambuilding is great and building characters is fun.

Gacha system:
Both very generous and very harsh. For most players, this is an incredibly generous system that gives out pulls like candy, but as you approach endgame if you haven't researched a team and invested properly you may begin to struggle. If you think about your choices and ask around in the discord you should be fine though!

Art and Music:
Beautiful, one of the things that keeps me coming back to this game is the stunning art and the incredible music. The Character designs are nearly all phenomenal and really lean into being creative as opposed to a lot of the generic same-face anime characters you get in other Gacha games. The Enemies are similarly terrifying and also awe inspiring at times.

Story:
IMPORTANT NOTE: While the main story is now fully human translated, some of the important side stories remain badly machine translated. It is bearable and can be ignored, but it is still a mar on the story.
Apart from that the story is fun! I'll be vague to avoid spoilers but it's Very sad at times. It leans into the dismal and tragic world really well while somehow always having this almost hopeful quality and tone. That despite the odds and the danger, humanity will endure. 

May the Silver Key guide your path!

items.title: [正面] This game is quite enjoyable, the mechanics are re...
items.summary:
This game is quite enjoyable, the mechanics are refreshing especially for a gacha game. I like the art style, the gameplay and the plot quite a lot. If you enjoy turn-based games, this is a MUST play. :)

    "That which is dead can eternally lie, but that which is forgotten eternally die."

items.title: [正面] Morimehns is a fun little game. I haven't played m...
items.summary: Morimehns is a fun little game. I haven't played much yet but the story isn't where the game shines. It's artis decent and the roam-style card battling with SP is entertaining. However it needs more variety in classes.
